const resolveId = (id) => id; function AtImport(options) { options = { root: process.cwd(), path: [], skipDuplicates: true, resolve: resolveId, load: loadContent, plugins: [], addModulesDirectories: [], warnOnEmpty: true, ...options }; applyConditions(bundle, atRule); applyStyles(bundle, styles); } }; } AtImport.postcss = true; module.exports = AtImport; })); //#endregion export default require_postcss_import(); export { };
